title: Cat on watermelon but it's a totem
description: Just a resource pack for one meme cat
body:
# What does the resource pack look like?

![totem use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OEb5ME2d/images/f241ff387269dc40cc2a7419f0f26fe4865632a3.gif)

Also, with the change in the texture of the totem, the sound of the totem also changes to the one from the [original meme](https://youtu.be/ODJYwaBTLtU?si=O8_nvsfcEEOgQmSq)
